title: Add phx-value-id to a clickable row
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/live/events_list_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.EventsListLive). Render a list of rows with :for, where each row is
{evt.name}
. Add handle_event("select", %{"id" => id}, socket) that assigns :selected_id to id. mount/3 returns {:ok, assign(socket, events: [], selected_id: nil)}.
tier_rationale: Canonical phx-value-* pattern for event params. Single addition.
